content.text: i don't have a Saturday class stored for Mira — nothing in her memory or your local village discoveries mentions a specific Saturday enrollment. i can see she's enjoyed a parent-and-tot swim class and a library rhyme-time session recently, but neither has a day-of-week attached in what's been recorded. if you let me know the class name or day, i can save it so it's easy to pull up next time — or if you're looking for Saturday options in Toronto, i can search for toddler-friendly classes in your area.
